calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Dismissal on file. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
John Norman Dahlberg, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-30-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

An Order To Show Cause.
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Safeway Inc.'s order to show cause regarding preliminary injunction is GRANTED. No opposition filed and defendant was defaulted on May 8, 2018. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

An Order To Show Cause.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Continued To May-18-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John N. Dahlberg of the law offices of Dillingham & Murphy, LLP (415-397-2700) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court hears from the moving party as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Hearing re ORDER TO SHAW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND RESTRAINING ORDER is CONTINUED to May 18, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Plaintiff has until May 10, 2018 to serve and file proof of service. Defendant's opposition is due by May 14, 2018. There shall be no reply. Notice by plaintiff.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
